instructions: Cascade from repo-root .greptile/. For hermes-mobile/** diffs, overweight connect/onboarding, Tailscale, auth probes, OTA vs native, and multi-Mac key scoping. Cite hermes-mobile/AGENTS.md fresh-user contract when flagging copy or gate regressions.

rules.rule: Connection surfaces must expose exactly one primary CTA at a time. Competing banners (Connected + Can't reach, Find computers + Fix USB + Pair relay) are regressions.
UI must not show Connected when auth probe fails (401/wrong key). /health 200 without authenticated probe is a ship-blocker false green.
Device/Maestro chat composer automation must type only 'make money today' — never gibberish probe strings.
